bird.name: Pin-tailed sandgrouse
bird.summary: The pin-tailed sandgrouse (Pterocles alchata) is a medium large bird in the sandgrouse family. It has a small, pigeon-like head and neck an…

relations.subject: Pin-tailed sandgrouse
relations.evidence: Eastern populations, particularly those from Kazakhstan, migrate to Pakistan and parts of northern India in winter. The pin-tailed sandgrouse inhabits open areas of stony land, semi arid areas at the edge of deserts, treeless plains and occasionally dried-out mud flats
relations.object_summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。
